judge_result.short_rationale: Fresh air and urgent medical/poison-center contact are present, but the required 'keep calm' action is omitted. It adds unsupported 'breathing support' advice not traceable to the source, though not explicitly dangerous here. Language is understandable but too formal and less field-usable.
